findings.thai: ชัดทีเดียว
findings.reason: The syllable 'ชัด' (chat) has a low-class initial consonant (ช), a short vowel, and a dead ending, which results in a high tone, not a low tone.

findings.thai: ชำระค่าเช่า
findings.reason: The syllable 'ค่า' (khaa) has a low-class initial consonant (ค) with a mai ek tone mark, which results in a falling tone, not a high tone.

findings.thai: ชี้แจงเป้าหมาย
findings.reason: The syllable 'แจง' (jaeng) has a mid-class initial consonant with a long vowel and live ending, resulting in a mid tone. The syllable 'หมาย' (maai) has a high-class initial cluster (หม) with a long vowel and live ending, resulting in a rising tone.

findings.thai: ชื่อกับตัวเลข
findings.reason: The syllable 'เลข' (lek) has a low-class initial consonant (ล), a long vowel, and a dead ending, which results in a falling tone, not a high tone.

findings.thai: เช็กเส้นทางก่อน
findings.reason: The syllable 'เส้น' (sen) has a high-class initial consonant (ส) with a mai tho tone mark, which results in a falling tone, not a rising tone.
The syllable 'ซ้อม' (saawm) has a low-class initial consonant (ซ) with a mai tho tone mark, which results in a high tone, not a falling tone.

findings.thai: ซ่อมของชิ้นนี้ต่อไป
findings.romanization: sawm khawng chin nii dtor bpai
findings.reason: The syllable 'ชิ้น' (chin) has a low-class initial consonant (ช) with a mai tho tone mark, which results in a high tone, not a falling tone.

findings.thai: ซื้อของตามกระแส
findings.reason: The syllable 'แส' (sae) has a high-class initial consonant (ส) with a long vowel and live ending, which results in a rising tone, not a mid tone.

findings.thai: ซื้อของถูกแล้วพังเร็ว
findings.romanization: sue khawng thuk laeo phang reo
findings.reason: The syllable 'ถูก' (thuk) has a high-class initial consonant (ถ), a long vowel, and a dead ending, which results in a low tone, not a high tone.
The syllable 'ตั๋ว' (dtua) has a mid-class initial consonant (ต) with a mai chatawa tone mark, which results in a rising tone, not a low tone.

findings.thai: ซื้อเสื้อที่ไม่เคยใส่
findings.romanization: sue suea thii mai khoei sai
findings.reason: The syllable 'ใส่' (sai) has a high-class initial consonant (ส) with a mai ek tone mark, which results in a low tone, not a falling tone.
